pi_items.source: Web search for official airport name and SFGOV/Wikipedia confirmation
Web search of SFO parking facilities reveals all three terms are used: 'International Garage', 'Long-Term Parking Garage', 'Long-Term Surface Lot', 'Cell Phone Waiting Lot'

Task description explicitly instructs agent to find specific parking garage, not main airport: 'Do NOT navigate to the main airport result directly. Instead, open the location details. Use the Parking or Nearby feature... to find a specific parking garage'
Web search confirms coordinates correspond to Googleplex at 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA

pi_items.verified_value: Sygic GPS app uses TomTom maps and real-time traffic data
pi_items.source: Web search of Sygic documentation confirms app uses TomTom 2D/3D maps for offline navigation and TomTom Traffic for real-time updates

privileged_info_summary: The navigate_to_airport_parking task uses the real Sygic GPS navigation app (com.sygic.aura) with actual TomTom mapping data. The target location 'San Francisco International Airport' is correctly named; SFO has multiple verified parking facilities including International Garage, Long-Term Parking Garage, and Long-Term Surface Lot. The task correctly emphasizes avoiding generic airport navigation and instead directing agents to specific parking facilities using proper keywords. The mock location starting point is set to the Googleplex in Mountain View, California (37.4220, -122.0841), which is approximately 39 miles north of SFO. All metadata claims are accurate descriptions of real-world locations and facilities.
